page_header.label: BRAND
page_header.title: Brand Guidelines
page_header.description: Resources for press, partners, and community.

sections.heading: Design Principles
sections.description: Our visual identity reflects our values: transparency, technical precision, and uncompromising privacy.

principles.title: Brutalist
principles.description: Sharp edges, hard shadows, zero border radius. Our design language is uncompromising, functional, and deliberately stark—just like our approach to privacy.

principles.title: Monochrome
principles.description: Black, white, and grays. No unnecessary color distractions. This palette ensures clarity, focus, and timeless aesthetic appeal across all mediums.

principles.title: Technical
principles.description: Monospace typography, uppercase labels, grid systems. Every design decision reflects the precision and transparency of our underlying technology.

sections.heading: Brand Assets
sections.description: Download our complete brand kit including logo files, color palettes, typography specimens, and usage guidelines for all your creative needs.

brandKit.description: SVG logos, color swatches, font files, guidelines

contact.text: For custom usage or press inquiries, contact
